reviews.review_description:
I’ve bought a few fps shooter games with zombie themes over the past couple of years, oftentimes at full price. Though they’ve been good, I can’t quite put them into the same category as this. I bought it with an attitude of, “it’s so cheap, so I’ll not worry,” and of course ended up finding it the most fun of them all, talk about bang for your buck. Somewhat like quake and doom together with three maps and power ups/ammo scattered throughout. 

I can’t believe the price vs the game. There are five difficulties per map and rewards are spent to level up perks, weapons and melee. With one map recently completed on all difficulties, I’ve strangely found the intro shottie my main weapon of choice. Though there are so many choices to use and level up. Don’t give it a second thought in buying, great game!
(played for a few minutes so far) I would say this is "AA" to "AAA" quality and worth more than its price.

Only thing that's irritating is the bullets leave no marks on the zombies. 
Good game though.

I got this game about two years ago and I keep coming back to it. I wish they would update this this game, because it is a bit dated, but still very fun! I really like the weapons upgrading system, and this game can get quite intense when larger enemies come in groups. I wish the dev would create new game modes. I’m specifically looking for game modes, like multiplayer, mixed reality, and maybe a new DLC with a story mode.

It’s an amazing game, and I rate it 4 stars because even though it’s a game I really enjoy it can still be improved. I don’t care if I have to pay $30+ for a multiplayer or story mode in this game, but it works be a dream come true! 

Add me I play co-op games

For a $4 game?? The graphics are amazing, best out of any game I’ve played in my quest, the gameplay is interesting, enjoyable, and very replay able. This game could be $15 and I still think it would be worth it. There are so many different guns and melees to choose from and you can level up to unlock them and to unlock the coins which you can buy upgrades for them.
I tried to refund and contacted support and they couldn't help.

Rest In Pieces is a FPS action packed wave shooter, with strong Doom vibes. This is a fast action VR game, where you will kill hordes of zombies, demons the undead and much more. You will have to survive wave after wave of Hellish creatures. You will feel like you are in a Doom game and can't stop moving to survive. 

The game also comes with a lot of content to unlock as you level up, and progress through the story. From unlocking a new play style Horde Mode, to many new weapons, and upgrades for all those weapons, plus more.

It is a fun horror game to play for Halloween, with lots of content to keep you coming back. It you are a horror or Doom fan, this is a game you will want to check out.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/sVWUhBy1eX4
This game is worth way more than 3.99 really fun and it would be awesome if it had a co-op feature
This game is a great game but one thing, maybe the devs can update the game to where you hold the guns with a second hand? Because it honestly feel weird with one hand but in all this game is great.

Update…

Just a few tips I found.

Every map has a an area that allows you to snip the monsters with ease.


1st map- look for the stone wall connect to the outer wall. When you get on top of it all the bigger bosses will freeze and zombies only will move twords you.

2nd map- get in the pit. The monsters will come at you from one direction only and you can pick them off. Also there is a dead end that will protect your back and only one way for them to get to you. 

3rd map- there is a dead end where you can do the same as above. But on this one just keep moving. 

On horde mode this comes in very handy to get to higher waves. 

School- there are two classrooms that have either boxes next to the wall or desk and chairs you can get behind. You will be able to kill for ages until you are bored. 

Outpost- only tip for this is to keep moving. 
There are two guns that will help you out, when you see a circle ⭕️ behind a gun it means you need to stand in it or the gun will stop working. 

Hell- probably the funnest one. Just run. They cannot out run you.   There is a plank of wood that is sticking out of the ground at an angle. You can get on that and pick them off. But you will be a sitting duck for anything that shoots. 

Weapon progression, go big as fast as you can.  

You can die from your own explosives. 

Had to really get into it and cow balls it’s fing fun.  

Hope there will be more updates for this.

reviews.review_title: Is this is what hell is like?
reviews.review_description:
What a great game!  Loved playing this game from the first try. It's not easy, but not so difficult that one would just give up.  I love the different looks and ideas of this game.  Yes, it's a shooter, but the enemies are much different than the standard shooter games.  Fight your way out of what I would call "Hell"

UPDATE:  It's been three years since I originally reviewed this game and there has NOT been any updates or changes.  Would be nice if you continued to work on the game and possibly add new levels.

This game is awesome. It has a fair amount of content considering it's 4$. It's an arcade fast paced shooter kind of like DOOM. You fight off hordes of demons with a variety of weapons, like melee, pistols, assault rifles, shotguns, you name it, you can fight with it. The game has 2 modes, missions and horde mode. Horde mode is infinite, and kill demons for as long as you want. Missions are like expeditions, go in, kill demons, get to the final wave, kill the boss, and you win. There's different difficulties that unlock after each difficulty you complete, eventually leading to the hardest one, Rest in Pieces. The missions have 3 maps, and so does the Horde mode. Horde mode maps are different from the mission maps. I really enjoy this game, and will make a review video and update this review with the link once its up.

Thank you to the developer!
This is a absolute amazing game! If you love Doom . You will like this game !
I highly recommend it! I would give it 10 stars if I could ! **********
Nice wave shooter with some unique enemies! Lots of fun.

WOW ! £2.99 .....  THIS GAMES AS GOOD AS OTHER OCULUS STORE GAMES PRICED AT £14.99.. WASN'T SURE AT FIRST BUT A SHOT TO KILL GAME IS RELATIVELY THE SAME AS OTHERS . BIT LIKE A DOOM STYLE SHOOTER  . EXCELLENT GRAPHICS , LOADING WEAPONS ARE SMOOTH . LOADS OF UPGRADES, WEAPONS ARE FUN . SO MUCH COULD COME FROM THIS GAME LIKE A MULTIPLAYER MODE .

This game is surprisingly fun for its low cost.
This definitely feels like an investment, 5 bucks now for a game that looks like it will turn out valued much higher.  I'm sure multiplayer has been mentioned a bunch already, looking forward to future updates. Good stuff

I would love to hear an update from the dev about future updates and or things to look forward to.

The game is great whith a leveling system and everything even for like 5 bucks this game has so much potential if it were taken back up given more weapons and levels maybe even a story, this game would be the best doom vr game I have ever played.
So very fun and it actually made me jump a few times

Fun game, lots of customization. Kinda feels like a small  1 or 2 person team but its still great fun, I love the enemy design and its got a nice little metal soundtrack , if its original even more props. Wish the horde gave exp, and its got bugs here and there, but nothing thats gonna interrupt gameplay for me this far. Wish I could figure how to hold weapons 2 hand but I dont think its intended, 1 hand is pretty accurate, has a counter strike kinda feel. Great game , 4 dollars well spent
